ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., SF, PF, C, PG) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Player's age */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "score1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "minutes" REAL /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of three-point shots made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., Groin, Ankle) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., GTD, Out) */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected date of return from the injury */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., Minor, Major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponent_defensive_rank" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defensive ranking */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position (e.g., SF, PF, C, PG) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Defensive ranking for that position */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the ranking is for */,
  "defensive_efficiency" REAL /* Defensive efficiency rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opponent_defensive_rank_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "event" TEXT /* Specific event or game the award was given */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., NBA Championship, Conference Champions) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "event" TEXT /* Specific event or game the award was given */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_awards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "options" TEXT /* Any contract options */,
  "bonuses" REAL /* Any performance bonuses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_highlights" (
  "highlight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each highlight */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "highlight_type" TEXT /* Type of highlight (e.g., dunk, three-pointer) */,
  "highlight_description" TEXT /* Description of the highlight */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the highlight in the game */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score at the time of the highlight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highlight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_highlights_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_highlights_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media account */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Player's handle on the platform */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers on the platform */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update date for the social media account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_social_media_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
